This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] initial position
  assert_equals: expected -250 but got 250
[FAIL] scroll to 100
  assert_equals: expected -250 but got 250
[FAIL] scroll to 101
  assert_equals: expected -250 but got 250
[FAIL] scroll back to 100
  assert_equals: expected -250 but got 250
[FAIL] redisplay at 100
  assert_equals: expected -250 but got 250
[FAIL] scroll to 299
  assert_equals: expected -250 but got 250
Harness: the test ran to completion.
